zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis於1627年8月5日在英國艾可納哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇受洗。她和John Samuel WOODCOCK至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1676年4月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托阿特萊包洛享年48歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托諾斯 阿特萊包盧沃科克 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis于1627年8月5日在英国艾可納哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇受洗。她和John Samuel WOODCOCK至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1676年4月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托阿特萊包洛享年48岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托諾斯 阿特萊包盧沃科克 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Curtis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a refined person, sometimes perhaps given ironically, from Middle English, Old French courteis, courtois, curtis ‘courtly, refined, urbane’ (derivative of Old French court; see Court 1).

variants.name: Curtice
meanings: Possibly an altered form of North German   Gerdes  .

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis was christened on 5 August 1627, in All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, England. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with John Samuel WOODCOCK. She died on 26 April 1676, in Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 48, and was buried in Woodcock Cemetery, North Attleborough, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis a été baptisée le 5 août 1627, à All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec John Samuel WOODCOCK. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1676, à Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodcock Cemetery, North Attleborough, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis wurde am 5. August 1627 in All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, England getauft. Sie hatte mit John Samuel WOODCOCK mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1676 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Woodcock Cemetery, North Attleborough, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis è stato battezzato il 5 agosto 1627 nel All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, England. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con John Samuel WOODCOCK. Morì il 26 aprile 1676, nel Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodcock Cemetery, North Attleborough, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, Engla: イギリスエセックスナズエイングアル サインツ チャーチ

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtisは1627年8月5日にイギリスエセックスナズエイングアル サインツ チャーチで洗礼を受けた。彼女はJohn Samuel WOODCOCKとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1676年4月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルアットレボロで48歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルノース アットレボロウウッドコック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, Engla: 영국 에세스 나즈인그 앨 세인츠 처르치
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이

ko.Rehoboth, Bristil Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis(은)는 1627년 8월 5일 영국 에세스 나즈인그 앨 세인츠 처르치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Samuel WOODCOCK(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1676년 4월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 애틀레버로에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 노르스 애틀레버루 우드콕 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis foi batizada em 5 de agosto de 1627, em All Saints Church, Nazeing, Essex, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com John Samuel WOODCOCK. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1676, em Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodcock Cemetery, North Attleborough, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Curtis была крещена 5 августа 1627 г. в местности алл сеинц чурч, назинг, эссекс, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от John Samuel WOODCOCK. Она умерла 26 апреля 1676 г. в местности аттлеборо, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности вудкокк кеметири, норт аттлебороую, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
